title: Senior Financial Analyst - Yes Bank Global Group - Immediate Joiners Preferred

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - Yes Bank Global Group - Immediate Joiners Preferred
jsonLd.description:
Yes Bank Global Group invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Senior Financial Analyst at our Mysuru location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Yes Bank Global Group:
Yes Bank Global Group is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Yes Bank Global Group!
